content.en:
Time Firm.

There is a task here to kill a half-step Legendary Realm, and the task reward is not much, and it can't attract the Legendary Realm Lord, but only the Half-Step Legendary Realm.

And if the Half-Step Legendary Realm wants to hunt down the Half-Step Legendary Realm, it is not so easy, if the other party wants to hide, it is really difficult to find.

As a result, many tasks here have been unfinished.

Soon, Ye Tian locked on a task

"Kill the Black Pupil Lord!"

The Black Pupil Lord is an ordinary half-step Legendary Realm Lord, who is cruel, slaughtering his own clan, and even forcibly slaughtering an ordinary Eternal Sea, and likes to plunder the belongings of other Legendary Lords, killing too many Legendary Lords.

Eventually, the Black Pupil Lord offended a powerful half-step Legendary Realm Lord, and was hunted down, and a mission was issued in the Time Firm.

Since then, the Black Pupil Lord has disappeared, and only occasionally there have been some large-scale massacres.Basically, it can be confirmed that it has a relationship with the Black Pupil Lord, but because the other party's hidden methods are too clever, so the Black Pupil Lord has not been found so far.

Ye Tian took over the task of the Black Pupil Lord, and immediately began to look for the Black Pupil Lord.

This quest also 147 provides some information, such as where the Black Pupil Lord has appeared, etc.

Knowing the information, Ye Tian could almost find the other party 100%.

Wow!

Ye Tian urged Ruyi Void Tissot, and soon came to an eternal sea.

This Eternal Sea is called the Wind and Rain Sea, it is a very ordinary Eternal Sea, much more powerful than the Source Sea, there are about a thousand Legendary Lords, and the strongest one is the Legendary Lord of the Transcendent Realm.

But alas, this Eternal Sea was slaughtered by the Black Pupil Lord.

Now the Eternal Sea has once again given birth to new beings, but due to the short period of time, not even a Legendary Lord has been born.

After descending on the sea of wind and rain, Ye Tian used his ability to control time and began to spy on the past time.

Any Legendary Realm Lord who controls time can spy on the past time, and Ye Tian can do it

What is really difficult is to spy on the future, even many peak Legendary Realm Lords can't spy on the future of half-step Legendary Realm Lords, but the future life of ordinary people, it is very easy, and some true gods of ordinary worlds can do it.

Airplanes!!!!

The scenes of the past were presented in front of Ye Tian, and soon Ye Tian locked in a certain time period in the past and saw the Black Pupil Lord.

In the past, the Black Pupil Lord was slaughtering like crazy.

"I spied on the Lord of the Black Eyes, and maybe some of the Eternal Masters spied on me like this. "

Ye Tian muttered.

However, the difference with the Eternal Master is that he can only spy and not exert any influence, while the Eternal Master can do a certain degree of influence, which is terrifying.

I saw Ye Tian grab a handful, grab a wisp of time breath, and immediately enter the long river of time with consciousness, and began to explore the figure of the black pupil lord.

Unless the black pupil is supported by the power of the lord of the legendary realm, or the secret treasure of resisting time, it can't block the check from time

Soon, Ye Tian locked on to the Black Pupil Lord.

"Found it!"

Ye Tian smiled.

......

A region of nothingness, in a treasure land.

The Black Pupil Lord is cultivating here, and this place is very hidden, and it will definitely not attract the attention of other half-step Legendary Realm Lords.

As long as there is no Legendary Realm Lord chasing him, he is not afraid.

And what kind of person was the Legendary Realm Lord, how could he come to hunt down an ordinary half-step Legendary Realm Lord like him, so he was not worried at all.

Suddenly.

He felt the fluctuations of time and space.

The space was distorted, and a figure appeared, and it was Ye Tian.

"Half-step Transcendence Realm Legendary Lord!"

When the Black Pupil Lord saw Ye Tian, he breathed a sigh of relief, such ants, he could destroy countless with his hands.

"Die!"

After the Black Pupil Lord was ready to kill Ye Tian, he changed places and continued to hide.

Suddenly.

He felt that the time around him was completely out of his control, and the terrifying power of time attacked.

"Take control of time!"

The black pupil lord's pupils shrank sharply, and the half-step transcendent realm lord in front of him was actually able to control time, which was too exaggerated.

However, he was not afraid, even a half-step transcendent realm lord who controlled time would definitely not be able to kill him, not even as strong as him.

However, he didn't fight Ye Tian because it wasn't necessary.

In case Ye Tian informed the other top half-step Legendary Realm lords, he, a half-step Legendary Realm who had embarked on the task of the Time Merchant Bank, was afraid that he would be besieged.

"Let's go!"

The Black Pupil Lord is about to tear the space apart and leave.

At this moment, Ye Tian flicked his fingers, and a drop of water appeared.

Shout!

This drop of water pierced through the hole.

Seeing this drop of water, the Black Pupil Lord trembled, as if he had encountered an incomparably terrifying existence.

This is no ordinary water, it is the water of time, the water of time that has condensed the power of terror.

"Time is the best!"

The Black Pupil Lord felt that he was hallucinating, a half-step transcendent realm lord controlled time, it was enough to defy the sky, he had never heard of it before, and now this half-step legendary realm lord had also mastered a time supreme technique.

You must know that many Legendary Realm Lords have not mastered a supreme skill!

Poof!

The body of the Black Pupil Lord was pierced by the dripping water of time, and a third of the legendary body was annihilated.

It only takes three such attacks for him to surely die.

Moreover, this is his essence, not a doppelganger, his doppelganger is somewhere else.

As soon as the ontology dies, it really dies.

The Black Pupil Lord forcibly shuttled through the Void and left, but with the Wishful Void Tissot and the ability to control time, the Black Pupil Lord was caught up in an instant.

"This lord, spare your life!"

Lord Black Eyes begged for mercy.

However, it was the second time drip.

Another third of the legendary body was annihilated, and if it was another time, he would not be able to maintain his body at all, and his body would collapse directly, which was equivalent to direct annihilation.

He cast the forbidden spell, many secret treasures, and the eternal treasure burning origin, just to resist the third time.

Under the dripping of time, layers of defense have been penetrated.

In the end, the Black Pupil Lord's body had not been completely annihilated, but it was already in a dying state.

This time, Ye Tian didn't cast the Time Drip, just the power to control time, and instantly killed the Black Pupil Lord.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian took the corpse of the Black Pupil Lord with countless cracks and went to Xuyang Mountain.

Soon, Sunrise Mountain arrived!_
